summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Reviews & Ratings feature (Phase B1). Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/products/{id}/reviews returns reviews list, average_rating, total_reviews
Backend: GET /api/products/{id}/reviews returns empty list for non-existent product
Backend: GET /api/reviews/can-review/{product_id} returns can_review boolean with reason/order_id
Backend: GET /api/reviews/can-review requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/reviews/create requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/reviews/create prevents duplicate reviews (same user, same product)
Backend: POST /api/reviews/create requires valid order_id
Backend: POST /api/reviews/create requires product to be in the order
Backend: POST /api/reviews/create validates rating range (0-10)
Backend: GET /api/admin/reviews returns all reviews with product names (admin only)
Backend: GET /api/admin/reviews requires admin role
Backend: PUT /api/admin/reviews/{id}/hide hides a review
Backend: PUT /api/admin/reviews/{id}/show shows a hidden review
Backend: PUT /api/admin/reviews/{id}/hide returns 404 for non-existent review
Backend: PUT /api/admin/reviews/{id}/show returns 404 for non-existent review
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/reviews/{id} returns 404 for non-existent review
Backend: Hidden reviews do not appear in public product reviews list
Frontend: Product detail page shows Customer Reviews section
Frontend: Reviews section displays average rating (9.0/10) and total count
Frontend: Reviews list shows user name, Verified Purchase badge, rating, comment, date
Frontend: Leave a Review button NOT visible for non-logged-in users
Frontend: Leave a Review button NOT visible for users who already reviewed
Frontend: Admin Reviews page (/admin/reviews) loads correctly
Frontend: Admin Reviews page shows stats cards (Total Reviews, Visible, Average Rating)
Frontend: Admin Reviews page shows search input
Frontend: Admin Reviews page shows reviews table with all columns
Frontend: Admin can toggle review visibility (Visible/Hidden)
Frontend: Visibility toggle updates stats (Visible count changes)
Frontend: Toast notifications appear for hide/show actions
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_reviews_api.py - Created comprehensive test suite for reviews feature
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: order_test_review_001 (completed order for admin with product prod_7889643617d1). One review already exists from admin on Premium Extra Virgin Olive Oil.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reviews & Ratings feature (Phase B1) fully implemented and tested. Key files: server.py (backend endpoints lines 2285-2466), ProductDetailPage.js (reviews section), AdminReviews.js (admin moderation page). Test order 'order_test_review_001' with status 'completed' exists for admin user containing product 'prod_7889643617d1'. One review already exists from admin on this product.

public_reviews_endpoint.details: GET /api/products/{id}/reviews returns reviews list, average_rating, total_reviews

verified_buyer_only.details: Only users with completed orders containing the product can leave reviews

rating_validation.details: Rating must be 0-10 integer, comment max 500 chars

admin_moderation.details: Admin can list all reviews, hide/show/delete reviews

frontend_product_reviews.details: Product detail page shows reviews section with average rating and verified reviews

frontend_admin_reviews.details: Admin Reviews page shows table with moderation controls (visibility toggle, delete)
